certificate.module_name: Apple corecrypto Module v14.0 [Intel, Kernel, Software, SL1]
certificate.description: The Apple corecrypto Kernel Space Module for Intel is a software cryptographic module running on a multi-chip standalone hardware device and provides services intended to protect data in transit and at rest.
